_notes.broadway-sf: Site is broadwaysf.com but redirects to us.atgtickets.com. JS-rendered React app — needs playwright, not static fetch.
_notes.todays-tix: JSON-LD strategy: parses schema.org TheaterEvent entries from <script type=application/ld+json>. Stable across page redesigns. URL is /sf-bay-area/, NOT /san-francisco.
_notes.sfmoma: Use /events/ NOT /calendar/ (which is 'What's On View' exhibitions). HTML cards via .archive--type-event.
_notes.famsf: Correct URL is /calendar (not /de-young/calendar). Page appears to be JS-rendered or empty server-side; needs more inspection. Skipped in v1.
_notes.bampfa: Correct URL is /calendar (not /programs/calendar). Cards use .calendar-event class but dates are inferred from a 'April 2026' header + day-of-month per group. Complex date model — skipped in v1, parser will need month-rollover logic.
_notes.asian-art: Lives at calendar.asianart.org subdomain, not /events/ on main site. ~26 events in <li> elements, no JSON-LD on listing or detail pages. Needs custom HTML walk — skipped in v1.
_notes.berkeley-rep: Show pages emit ONE schema.org Event LD entry per individual performance (e.g. 43 entries for The Monsters). collapsePerformances() folds these into one logical Event with start=earliest, end=latest.
_notes.act: Two-stage: extractShowUrls() over /whats-on/2025-26-season → fetch each show page → parseShowJsonLd() the schema.org Event.
